name: blood-type-badge
title: Blood Type Badge
description: ABO/Rh chip in fixed monospace with an optional red-cell compatibility popover.
clinicalNotes: Self-reported blood type is never sufficient for a transfusion decision — the `unverified` state exists precisely to force UIs to distinguish reported from lab-confirmed, and renders with a dashed border, a marker, and a caution in the popover. The compatibility table is red-cell (RBC) ABO/Rh only and is informational: it is not a crossmatch, and the popover says so. The type is exposed to screen readers spelled out ("A positive"), not as a bare glyph. Plasma/platelet compatibility is inverse to RBC and intentionally not shown here to avoid implying this is a transfusion tool.
notes: medcn-original. Composes badge (monospace chip) + popover; static RBC_COMPAT table exported for reuse.
